reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: CONFIRMED. Gate 1 (Dead Code): Passed - ValidateHashes is actively called from MempoolBlobTxValidator:287 in mempool blob transaction validation path. Gate 2 (Trust Boundary): Passed - Attack is reachable via untrusted P2P network (blob transactions in mempool). Gate 3 (Code Verification): Passed - Phase 03's code reading is accurate. ValidateHashes (IBlobProofsManager.cs:44-65) has two loops with mismatched bounds: first loop (line 48) iterates blobVersionedHashes.Length for format checks, second loop (line 56) iterates blobs.Blobs.Length for commitment validation. No length equality check exists between these arrays. ValidateLengths (BlobProofsManagerV0.cs:38-54) only validates wrapper internal consistency (Blobs.Length == Commitments.Length == Proofs.Length), not the relationship to transaction.BlobVersionedHashes. Gate 4 (Exploitability): Passed - An attacker can trigger this via P2P network by sending a blob transaction with BlobVersionedHashes.Length > wrapper.Blobs.Length, causing extra hashes to bypass commitment validation, breaking blob integrity guarantees per EIP-4844. Gate 5 (Spec Cross-Reference): Passed - 01e property PROP-5a6a79d5-inv-059 (outputs/01e_PARTIAL_MANUAL_176_210.json:20-34) explicitly requires 'tx.BlobVersionedHashes length must equal wrapper Blobs/Commitments/Proofs length' with assertion 'forall blob_tx: len(tx.BlobVersionedHashes) == len(wrapper.Blobs) == len(wrapper.Commitments) == len(wrapper.Proofs)'. The code deviates from this requirement. Gate 6 (Scope Check): Passed - Blob transaction validation is in-scope for Fusaka audit; no exclusions apply. Severity calibration: Original severity HIGH is justified. This allows an attacker to send blob transactions with unvalidated hash commitments, breaking the integrity property that every BlobVersionedHash must correspond to a verified blob. This could enable consensus violations if nodes accept different sets of blob data. Severity remains High per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json High criteria (network impact affecting >33% of nodes via invalid blob transactions).
reviewed_items.spec_reference: tx.BlobVersionedHashes length must equal wrapper Blobs/Commitments/Proofs length. Assertion: forall blob_tx: len(tx.BlobVersionedHashes) == len(wrapper.Blobs) == len(wrapper.Commitments) == len(wrapper.Proofs)
